evals.prompt: Take the latest failed unhandled babel-copy qa-report.json under /Users/luke/dev/translate/output, update babel-copy to address the remediation goals, rerun into a fresh timestamped output directory, run QA on the new comparison report, and write optimizer-report.md next to the handled report.
evals.expected_output: The agent finds the latest failed unhandled qa-report.json, makes targeted babel-copy changes, uses a new timestamped --output-dir for every rerun, and writes a detailed optimizer-report.md.

evals.prompt: Use the failed qa-report.json I provide for a form-heavy amendment PDF, determine whether the issues are pipeline-level or document-local, patch babel-copy only where the behavior should generalize, rerun the pipeline in a new timestamped directory, and include a machine-readable optimizer-report.json because there were multiple remediation items.
evals.expected_output: The agent routes remediation items to root causes, avoids overfitting one-off defects into code, reruns babel-copy in a new timestamped directory, and writes both optimizer-report.md and optimizer-report.json.
